headline: Costco's latest food court treat has fans divided
summary: Costco members don’t just shop in bulk. Sometimes, they like to grab a quick meal as part of the shopping experience. The warehouse club giant's food court has built a cult following over the years, with shoppers treating it like a reward at the end of a long grocery run. And there's a good reason ...

headline: Costco Raises Dividend And Bets On Exclusive Aussie Curl Care Offering
summary: Costco Wholesale (NasdaqGS:COST) has approved a meaningful quarterly dividend increase, signaling the Board's view on the company’s financial position and shareholder return priorities. The retailer is rolling out an exclusive Aussie Miracle Curls Extra Moisture Jumbo Dual Pack, a large format curl care product available only at Costco. These moves connect Costco’s capital return decisions with its focus on differentiated product offerings for members. Costco, known for its membership based...

headline: Sam's Club, BJs gain traction in area Costco dominates
summary: Remember the days when going out to dinner wasn't something you had to save up for? It used to be easier to work a weekly restaurant outing into a typical budget. But with food costs soaring, many consumers are moving away from restaurant meals and are prioritizing groceries instead. A good 37% of ...
